What We Do

Our Services

Every job is quoted on-site. No hidden fees. No surprises. Just straight talk and serious work.

01
🏚️
Household Cleanouts & Demolition

Full residential cleanouts from attic to basement. Estate cleanouts, hoarding situations, garage cleanouts, and interior demolition. We remove everything and leave it broom clean.

Estate Cleanouts Garage Cleanouts Interior Demo Full Removal
02
🏭
Industrial Cleanouts & Demolition

Commercial and industrial facility cleanouts at any scale. Warehouse teardowns, manufacturing plant decommissioning, factory floor clearances, and structural demolition. Built for the big jobs.

Warehouse Cleanouts Factory Decommission Structural Demo Commercial Scale
03
🔩
Machinery Rigging & Relocation

Safe and efficient rigging of heavy machinery for relocation, removal, or disposal. We handle the heavy iron others walk away from — and we recycle and process scrap metal responsibly.

Heavy Rigging Machine Relocation Scrap Processing Responsible Recycling
04
♻️
Scrap Metal Recycling

We haul ferrous and non-ferrous scrap of all types. Post-demolition salvage, old equipment, yard metal — we take it off your hands and ensure it's recycled responsibly, keeping it out of landfills.

Ferrous & Non-Ferrous On-Site Pickup Post-Demo Salvage Landfill Diversion
⚖️
Important — Standard Operating Condition
Regarding Mill Rights

Mill rights is not a service we offer — it is the condition under which we operate. All materials, scrap metal, and salvageable items removed during any job become the property of Ironclad Recycling LLC. This applies across all services: cleanouts, demolition, rigging, and scrap removal.

The value we recover from recycled materials is factored into the overall cost of each job. If you have questions about how mill rights apply to your specific project, please call us before booking: 508-769-2282.

All jobs are priced on evaluation. Contact us for a free on-site quote.

Straight Pricing. No Surprises.

♻️
